eval-criteria-1.content:
Detect implementation leakage introduced by recent gap resolutions:
1. Read `resolved.md` for resolved gaps with Outcome fields describing changes to the functional section
2. For each, check whether the added/modified text in the functional section contains:
   a. Internal component identifiers (CMP-* prefixes, pipeline stage names)
   b. Implementation mechanism names (triggers, hooks, guards, protocols)
   c. Technical thresholds or architecture terms (specific counts, phase-gate, topological sort)
   d. Implementor-facing language (deferred to implementation, implementor determines)
3. If none found: []
4. For each: {"id": <next_gap_id>, "change": "new", "title": "short title", "description": "Resolution of GAP-XX introduced <term> in functional section <area>"}
5. Source: resolution-leakage-detection
